title: Transform SelExtract to PackArrayDType when a type is needed.

features.name: parameter type alias with array slice on type parameter
features.description: Code should include a parameter type alias where the type expression uses array slice notation on another type parameter

features.name: interface typedef accessed via array of interface instances with type selection and slice
features.description: Code should include an interface with a typedef where the typedef is accessed through an array of interface instances using both type selection and array slice notation
